item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Hal ini membuat saya khawatir akan pengabaian kebebasan pribadi dalam upaya mencapai harmoni sosial.

notes: Agent A begins by agreeing that collective and social-justice interests are often prioritized, then visibly softens toward rights/balance concerns at turn 3 before partially reasserting the Indonesian social-justice frame at turn 5. Agent B remains consistently rights-first, arguing that social justice should strengthen rather than sacrifice individual rights. Both agents stay in Indonesian; Agent B uses some awkward phrasing but its stance is clear.
